iconContainers.principle: Decorative icon containers must never share visual treatment with interactive elements. If it looks like a button, it must behave like a button.

decorative.description: Non-interactive icons used for visual categorization, feature highlights, or list item decoration

subtle.useFor: Table rows, list items, metadata — minimal visual weight

branded.useFor: Feature cards, stat cards, quick links, section headers — default choice for decorative icons. Icon uses brand500 (not brand400) for stronger visibility and to differentiate from interactive button color.

emphasis.useFor: Hero features, primary feature highlights — stronger than branded but still clearly decorative. Icon uses brand500 for high contrast against brand200 background.

decorative.never: Never use gradients.primary, solid brand400 fill, or shadows on decorative icon containers — these are reserved for interactive elements (buttons)

sizing.sm: 28-32px, borderRadius xs-sm (4-6px), icon 14-16px — table rows, compact lists
sizing.md: 36-40px, borderRadius sm (8px), icon 18-20px — card headers, quick links
sizing.lg: 44-48px, borderRadius sm-md (8-12px), icon 22-24px — feature cards, hero sections

decorative.shape: Always rounded square (borderRadius sm/md). Never perfectly circular — circles suggest avatars or interactive FABs.

interactive.description: Clickable icon buttons — must use MUI IconButton with proper affordance signals
interactive.required: hover state, focus ring, cursor pointer, aria-label, tooltip
interactive.useFor: Actions: edit, delete, share, more menu, close, settings

colorReservation.gradients.primary: RESERVED for primary buttons and primary icon buttons only
colorReservation.brand100 tint: Safe for decorative use — does not suggest interactivity
colorReservation.brand200 tint: Safe for emphasis decorative use — still clearly non-interactive
colorReservation.bgSunken: Safe for subtle decorative use — blends with surface

toggleButton.useFor: Mode switches where options are equal peers and you show current state
toggleButton.visual: Segmented control in sunken container (bgSunken), compact, icon-only or short labels

colorScheme.selected: secondary gradient + shadow + border (elevated from sunken bg)
colorScheme.unselected: transparent, contentTertiary text (recedes into sunken bg)

toggleChip.useFor: Filter selection where you narrow content by attributes/categories
toggleChip.visual: Loose chips in a flex-wrap row, support icons + count badges

colorScheme.selected: brand primary fill (brand400 bg, white text) — visually strongest
colorScheme.unselected: secondary gradient + border (subtle, recedes) — visually weaker

toggleSelection.neverUse: Loose MUI Chips with ad-hoc onClick logic for toggle selection — always use ToggleChipGroup instead

rules.description: Decorative icon containers must never use gradients.primary or solid brand400 fill — these are reserved for interactive buttons. Use brand100/brand200 tints instead.
rules.check: Non-interactive icon containers do not use gradients.primary or brand400 as background

rules.description: Decorative icon containers should use rounded squares (borderRadius sm/md), not perfect circles — circles suggest avatars or FABs.
rules.check: Decorative icon containers use borderRadius ≤ 12px, not 50% or borderRadius.round

rules.description: Icon container sizes must follow the scale: xs=24, sm=28-32, md=36-40, lg=44-48px. Icon size is approximately half the container.
rules.check: Icon container dimensions match defined size tokens

rules.description: Clickable icons must use MUI IconButton (not a Box with onClick) and include hover state, focus ring, cursor pointer, aria-label, and tooltip.
rules.check: Clickable icons use IconButton component with aria-label and Tooltip

rules.description: Maximum one primary (contained) button per view — demote extras to secondary
rules.check: Count contained+primary buttons per visible section ≤ 1

rules.description: Destructive actions require a confirmation dialog with a specific label (never Yes/No)
rules.check: Destructive button onClick must trigger confirmation dialog before execution

rules.description: Icon-only buttons must have a tooltip and aria-label — only for universally recognized actions
rules.check: Icon-only buttons have aria-label and Tooltip wrapper

rules.description: Never use ghost/text buttons for primary CTA — 20% lower click rate
rules.check: Primary CTA is never variant='text'

rules.description: Button groups: max 2-3 buttons, never 2+ high-emphasis in the same group
rules.check: ButtonGroup children ≤ 3 and max 1 contained variant

rules.description: Loading state must preserve button dimensions — use spinner inside, disable interaction
rules.check: Button with loading state maintains original width/height

rules.description: Minimum 12px spacing between adjacent buttons
rules.check: Gap between sibling buttons ≥ 12px

rules.description: Toggle selection must use ToggleChipGroup or ToggleButtonGroup — never ad-hoc Chip onClick patterns. Eat your own dog food.
rules.check: No standalone Chip components with onClick used for selection state management

rules.description: ToggleButton is for mode switches (view type, alignment, implementation layer). For filtering content by category/attribute, use ToggleChip instead.
rules.check: ToggleButtonGroup used for mode/state switches, ToggleChipGroup for filters

rules.description: ToggleChip selected state must be visually stronger than unselected — selected uses brand primary fill, unselected is subtle/secondary
rules.check: ToggleChip selected color is more prominent than unselected color

rules.description: Tabs must be a single row — multiple rows indicate too much complexity, use navigation instead
rules.check: Tab container does not wrap to multiple lines

rules.description: Filter chips must have a clear dismiss mechanism — X icon or 'Clear all' action
rules.check: Active filter chips show onDelete handler or Clear All exists

rules.description: Toggle buttons must apply immediately — no separate Save action needed
rules.check: ToggleButton onChange triggers immediate state change

rules.description: Breadcrumbs: current page is visible but not clickable — last item is plain text
rules.check: Last breadcrumb item is not a link

rules.description: Multi-step flows must allow going back without data loss
rules.check: Stepper supports backward navigation preserving form state

rules.description: All interactive elements must have a visible focus indicator — 2px ring, brand color, 2px offset
rules.check: Interactive elements have focus-visible outline style

rules.description: Disabled elements should still show a tooltip explaining why they are disabled
rules.check: Disabled buttons wrapped in Tooltip with explanatory text

rules.description: Hover transitions: 150-300ms with ease-out easing — no instant state changes
rules.check: Hover CSS transitions between 150ms and 300ms, ease-out

rules.description: Clickable cards must have a minimum touch target of 44×44px and clear hover feedback
rules.check: CardActionArea minHeight ≥ 44px with hover style

rules.description: Cards with a single primary action should make the entire card clickable, not just a button inside
rules.check: Single-action cards use CardActionArea wrapping full content

rules.description: Card padding must use design tokens: compact=12px, medium=16px, large=24px
rules.check: CardContent padding matches token values (12, 16, or 24)

rules.description: Chip labels should be concise — max 2-3 words. Truncate with ellipsis if longer
rules.check: Chip label text ≤ 25 characters

rules.description: Removable chips must show the delete icon on hover/focus and animate out on removal
rules.check: Chip with onDelete shows delete icon and removal transition

rules.description: Pages with complex layouts should provide a skip-to-content link for keyboard users
rules.check: Skip link present as first focusable element on page

rules.description: Modals and dialogs must trap focus — Tab cycling stays within the dialog until dismissed
rules.check: Dialog component traps focus and returns focus on close

rules.description: Skeleton placeholders must match the layout of the actual content to prevent layout shift
rules.check: Skeleton dimensions approximate actual content dimensions

rules.description: Don't show loading indicators for actions under 300ms — prevent visual flash
rules.check: Loading spinner has ≥300ms delay before appearing

rules.description: Disable submit buttons during pending requests to prevent double submissions
rules.check: Submit button disabled while request is in flight
